reasoning: The control AU-9(2) focuses on storing audit information on separate physical systems or components, which is a physical infrastructure-level control. Kubernetes, being a container orchestration platform, does not inherently manage physical storage systems or components. Instead, it relies on underlying cloud or on-premise infrastructure for storage solutions. Therefore, this control is not directly applicable to Kubernetes security domains.
title: Protection Of Audit Information - Protection of audit information | store on separate physical systems or componen
